title: Visit briefs
description: A one-page appointment-prep brief the clinic/interpreter compiles from recent flagged labs, active symptoms, metric trends, and ready research — the printable summary a user walks into a doctor's visit with, ending in questions to ask. Not medical advice.

title.description: a short label for the brief, e.g. 'Visit prep — Mar 2026'

body.description: the brief in markdown (empty while pending); ends with 'Questions to ask'

status.description: 'pending' while the interpreter compiles it, 'ready' when done — set by the interpreter

periodFrom.description: start of the period the brief covers (null = all history)

periodTo.description: end of the period the brief covers (null = now)
